identification.LOCATION: Where exactly is the unit located? (e.g. Aisle 3, Bakery)

asset_details.BRAND: What is the Brand of the equipment? (Type 'N/A' to skip)
asset_details.MODEL: What is the Model? (Type 'N/A' to skip)
asset_details.TAG: What is the Asset Tag? (Type 'N/A' to skip)
asset_details.SERIAL: What is the Serial Number? (Type 'N/A' to skip)

safety.RISK: Are there any immediate safety risks?

BREAKER_TRIPPED.text: Is the circuit breaker tripped at the DB board?

BREAKER_RESET.text: Reset the breaker. Is power restored?

FITTING_POWER.text: Is power present at the fitting?

SOCKET_TEST.text: Has another appliance been tested in the socket?

DB_DAMAGE.text: Is there visible damage, burn marks or a hot breaker?

REFRIG_CONTROLLER.text: Is there power to the controller display?

food_safety.text: Has the cold chain been compromised?
Is product above the safe storage temperature?
Is there a risk of contamination?
Has production stopped due to this fault?
Is stock at risk of spoilage or disposal?

media.PHOTO: Can you take a photo/video? Send it via WhatsApp if possible. (Yes - sending / No)
